## Verification

- [ ] `python3 -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python3 -m pytest`
- [ ] `make smoke`
- [ ] `make prepublish` for release-facing changes
- [ ] `doneproof check --receipt .doneproof/receipts/latest.json`

## Receipt

Link or paste a sanitized DoneProof receipt. Do not include secrets, private paths, customer names, or provider credentials.
